## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

List the commands or checks you ran.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for visible UI or widget changes.

## Risk

Describe security, tenant isolation, crawler, retrieval, or deployment risks.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to one purpose.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior or architecture changed.
- [ ] Secrets and local environment files are not committed.
- [ ] UI changes were checked on desktop and mobile.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes mention tenant and domain boundaries.
